text: The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.

Mocking HttpClient.GetAsync skips your IHttpClientFactory pipeline, so a green test can ship a broken Polly or auth handler. The fix: a 30-line StubHttpMessageHandler. Then ConfigurePrimaryHttpMessageHandler swaps it in, the resilience handler runs for real, and Assert.Equal(3, calls) proves the retry actually retried.
